title: Android app delete or archive pulse
excerpt: I don’t know if it’s just me. I can only move a task…I can’t figure out a way to archive or delete one on the Android app.

posts.author: TWSPIVEY (Tim Spivey)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t know if it’s just me. I can only move a task…I can’t figure out a way to archive or delete one on the Android app.

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @TWSPIVEY,

Welcome to the monday.com community an extension of the family. If you are on the latest version of the Andriod you should be able to see the option in the 3-dot menu:

Screenshot_20191231-1700501080×2160 99.2 KB

Let me know if you see this from your end.
